features: Uplifting Lavender Aroma – Enjoy the refreshing scent of lavender essential oils, bringing brightness and tranquillity to your home. Perfect essential oils diffusers for home fragrance to create a vibrant, floral atmosphere.

Perfect for Diffusers – Add a few drops of this diffuser oil to your favourite essential oil diffuser or aromatherapy diffuser. Instantly refresh any room with a clean, uplifting aroma that feels both soothing and energising.

Directions for Use – Add water to the well of your burner, then add 2–3 drops of fragrance oil. Enjoy the gentle release of lavender essential oils as they diffuse, creating a calming and uplifting atmosphere in moments.

Convenient 4pk Set – Includes four 10ml bottles of aromatic lavender oil, perfect for everyday use. Always have enough diffuser oils fragrance at hand to keep your living space fresh, floral, and beautifully scented.

Fresh Gift Idea – A thoughtful present for friends or family who enjoy scented candles, oil diffusers essential oils, or stylish home fragrance. This uplifting essential oils set makes a joyful gift for any occasion.

The set includes four 10ml bottles of lavender scented oils. Each bottle is designed as an essential oil for diffusers for home, offering fresh and uplifting fragrance for daily use. How do I use these oils with a diffuser or burner? Directions for use: add water to the well of your burner, then add 2–3 drops of oil. These are perfect oil diffusers essential oils, releasing fragrance that instantly brightens and refreshes any room. Can these lavender oils be used for more than diffusers? Yes, they are versatile aromatherapy oils. Use them as fragrance oils for diffuser, in DIY candles, soaps, or as essential oils for diffusers for home to enhance ambience with vibrant lavender aroma. Are these oils suitable as gifts? Absolutely. This essential oil set is beautifully presented, making it a thoughtful gift for anyone who enjoys diffuser oils fragrance, scented candles, or a stylish home environment. What makes Lavender Haze oils ideal for everyday use? Each 10ml bottle is compact yet powerful. As aromatherapy diffuser oils and oil diffuser essential oils, they fill your space with floral freshness, perfect for meditation, yoga, study, relaxation, or simply brightening your home.
